title: Set monday to open on the last used screen
excerpt: When opening monday desktop app, it will always open in a small window on the main-desktop. It would be great, if monday - like other programms - would recognize the last used screen and arrangement on the screen. It sho…

posts.author: D.Schietinger (Daniel Schietinger)
posts.cookedHtml:
When opening monday desktop app, it will always open in a small window on the main-desktop. It would be great, if monday - like other programms - would recognize the last used screen and arrangement on the screen. It should open exaktly like it was last time used.
Right now i have to move it every morning from screen one to screen three and also change the size to my setup.

Greetings from Germany,
D. Schietinger
